description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline with a single qa stage that includes three jobs. Define a RAT job that runs in the qa stage, triggers the project ${RAT_PROJECT_PATH} on the master branch with forward yaml_variables enabled and strategy depend, needs Ubuntu-22.04-branch (no artifacts), Ubuntu-22.04 (no artifacts) and generate-facts (artifacts), and applies rules: manual when $PIPELINE_TYPE == "TRIGGERED_EE_PIPELINE", sets NIGHTLY='true' for $PIPELINE_TYPE == "EE_NIGHTLY_BUILD_PIPELINE", and sets PACKAGE_VERSION=${RAT_PACKAGE_VERSION} and PRE_RELEASE='true' for $PIPELINE_TYPE matching /^EE_(RC|TAG)_BUILD_PIPELINE$/. It also defines variables PACKAGE_URL=${RAT_PACKAGE_URL}, QA_IMAGE=${QA_IMAGE}, REFERENCE_ARCHITECTURE=${RAT_REFERENCE_ARCHITECTURE}. Add a RAT:FIPS job that extends RAT, needs Ubuntu-20.04-fips-branch (no artifacts) and generate-facts (artifacts), inherits the same rules, and overrides variables PACKAGE_URL=${RAT_FIPS_PACKAGE_URL} and REFERENCE_ARCHITECTURE=${RAT_FIPS_REFERENCE_ARCHITECTURE}. Finally, add a RAT:ref_arch_envs job extending RAT with a parallel matrix over REFERENCE_ARCHITECTURE values 1k,2k,3k,10k and the same manual rule for TRIGGERED_EE_PIPELINE.
